transcript: of four World Cup wins, here's Neville away from Roque Junior, clipped by Gilberto Silva, Germany able to advance, on we go, Bert Schneider getting it back here and delivering the cross with closer calling for it in the middle, it needed the important intervention of Ed Milson there to divert it away from danger, he's got to it I think ahead of his goalkeeper Marcos, an early attacking endeavor coming from Rudi Völler's German side
